title: 8 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including A Dividend King

title: Illinois Tool Works To Win With Disciplined Approach On Expansion
text: ITW is attractive for its sustained top line growth, especially compared to its peers. It enjoys continued organic growth and boasts a growing top line thanks to its MTS acquisition.

title: My Top 10 Dividend Payers For September
text: Dividends are an important source of income for investors of all types but especially those that rely on their investments in retirement. My ideal dividend payer accomplishes four goals: maximize total return, deliver a meaningful yield, experience strong growth, and provide a margin of safety.

title: Reasons Why You Should Retain Illinois Tool (ITW) for Now
text: Illinois Tool (ITW) is benefiting from a diversified business model, a robust product portfolio, enterprise strategy, acquisitions and a healthy cash position.

title: Down Between 18% and 37%: 3 Top Dividend Stocks That Are Passive Income Machines
text: These balanced companies have what it takes to grow their dividends for years to come.

title: 2 Stocks With Promising Earnings Growth Estimates
text: Predicting the future in investing is impossible, but companies with strong business models have a higher potential to outperform those without significant competitive advantages. I like to look for companies that consistently deliver dividend increases as well, as dividend growth often indicates a solid business model and a committment to shareholder returns.
